activities_projects.title: Family Timeline Activity
activities_projects.objective: Understand how history is divided into periods
steps: Ask your parents or grandparents about important events in their life
Write the events in order of years
Create a simple timeline of their life

activities_projects.title: Important Dates Chart
activities_projects.objective: Recognise the importance of dates in history
steps: Write 5 important dates from Indian history
Write the event that happened on that date
Display the chart in class
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Learns how dates help organise history
activities_projects.evaluation: Accuracy of dates and events (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Sources of History Around Us
steps: List things that can tell us about the past (letters, photographs, buildings)
Write where you can find them
Explain what information they give

activities_projects.title: Old vs New Objects
steps: Find one old object and one modern object at home
Compare their use and design
Write what they tell us about change over time

activities_projects.title: History Through Photographs
activities_projects.objective: Learn how photographs are historical records
steps: Look at an old photograph
Write what you observe in the picture
Write what it tells about life in that time

activities_projects.title: Create a Simple History Map
steps: Mark two historical places you know
Write one event related to each place
Label the locations clearly
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands the use of maps in history

activities_projects.title: Governor-General Research
steps: Choose one Governor-General mentioned in the chapter
Write two facts about him
Explain one important action he took

activities_projects.title: History Vocabulary List
activities_projects.objective: Understand key terms used in history
steps: Write words like colonial, periodisation, source
Write their meanings in simple words
Use each word in a sentence

activities_projects.title: Story of the Past
activities_projects.objective: Understand that history is a story of past events
steps: Write a short story about an event from the past
Mention when and where it happened
Explain why it was important

activities_projects.title: Class History Discussion
activities_projects.objective: Understand how historians study the past
steps: Discuss with classmates how we know about past events
List the different sources mentioned
Write a short summary of the discussion
